title: N-K Project

The '''N-K Project''',<ref name="Lord" /> also known as the '''N-K series''',<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> was a project by<ref name="Lord" /> [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Nycolai Kinesworthy]],<ref name="SWG:RotW" /> whom the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] hired to enhance [[Battle droid/Legends|combat droid]] technologies, and established in the [[Myyydril Caverns/Legends|Myyydril Caverns]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] under the careful eye of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Prophetess]] [[Merili]]. Merili soon enlisted the services of the unconventional [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] and total lunatic [[Treun Lorn]] and took him and Kinesworthy to the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] secret storehouse on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]], where they obtained and used the remains and personal effects of the late [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] to develop the test subject Lorn named the [[N-K Necrosis]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]].<ref name="Lord" />

{{Imp-stub}}
